name: Robot Framework Failure Review MCP
description: Example Claude Desktop configuration for a local Robot Framework result analysis tool.

tools.name: load_result_file
tools.description: Load a Robot Framework output.xml file and return a run summary.

tools.name: get_failed_tests
tools.description: Return all failed tests from the most recently loaded Robot Framework run.

tools.name: get_test_details
tools.description: Return detailed information for a single failed test.

inputs.name: test_name
inputs.description: Exact or unique partial test name.

tools.name: get_keyword_trace
tools.description: Return a readable keyword execution trace for a failed test.

inputs.name: test_name
inputs.description: Exact or unique partial test name.

tools.name: summarize_failures
tools.description: Return structured failure groups based on likely shared cause.

tools.name: compare_with_previous_run
tools.description: Compare two Robot Framework result files and identify new, repeated, fixed, and consistent failures.

tools.name: generate_bug_report_data
tools.description: Generate structured bug report information for a specific failed test.

resources.description: Summary of the most recently loaded Robot Framework run.
All failed tests in the most recently loaded run.
Detailed information for a specific Robot Framework test.
